Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance

Class FlowElementImpl

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.xml.impl.instance.ModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.BaseElementImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.FlowElementImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BaseElement, BpmnModelElementInstance, FlowElement, ModelElementInstance
Direct Known Subclasses:
DataObjectImpl, DataObjectReferenceImpl, DataStoreReferenceImpl, FlowNodeImpl, SequenceFlowImpl
public abstract class FlowElementImpl extends BaseElementImpl implements FlowElement
The BPMN flowElement element
Author:
Daniel Meyer, Sebastian Menski
